name: IyrAnt.modelCellAreai
title: The Cell Area of the Ice Sheet Model
description: When interpolated to a regular grid, it should be interpolated (not summed) with a conservative scheme to preserve total area
processing note:
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: time: mean CMIP7:area: sum time: mean,
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:xant yant time CMIP7:latitude longitude time,
